notableEvents.label: Alex Bregman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Nico Hoerner out at 2nd. Alex Bregman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Dansby Swanson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson grounds into a double play, third baseman Santiago Espinal to second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Seiya Suzuki to 3rd. Moisés Ballesteros out at 2nd. Dansby Swanson out at 1st.
